evidence.display: POD#1 L thoracotomy, T6-T8 corpectomy, anterior cage with EBL800ml    POD##15 Fu
evidence.text: POD#1 L thoracotomy, T6-T8 corpectomy, anterior cage with EBL800ml    POD##15 Fusion T2-L1 lami, IVC filter, CT R and L for abcess    Impaired Skin Integrity    Assessment:    New area of skin breakdown beneath left pannis (abd)    Action:    Area cleansed with commercial wound cleanser and size documented in    metavision, mepilex applied    see NCP and metavision for details    Response:    Pt tolerated cleansing and dsg application    Plan:    see plan of care    mepilex dsg reapply PRN    Document changes in size/healing    Respiratory failure, acute (not ARDS/[**Doctor Last Name 11**])    Assessment:    Pt remains intubated post-op on propofol gtt for and Dilaudid 2 mg IVP    q 3hrs PRN for pain.

evidence.display: ET-Tube suctioned for small to moderate amounts of very thick yellow    secretio
evidence.text: ET-Tube suctioned for small to moderate amounts of very thick yellow    secretions.

evidence.display: Scattered rhronchi in all lung fields    Action:    ET-tube retapped by resp the
evidence.text: Scattered rhronchi in all lung fields    Action:    ET-tube retapped by resp therapist    Vent weaned down to 40% FIO2.

evidence.display: Response:    Breath sounds improve with suctioning    ABGs 7.50 48 117 12 39
evidence.text: Response:    Breath sounds improve with suctioning    ABGs 7.50 48 117 12 39    Plan:    Wean to extubated after bronch by Thorasic team today    .H/O diabetes Mellitus (DM), Type II    Assessment:    Hyperglycemic 260, 257    Action:    Insulin gtt restarted at 3 units at 0230,    Response:    Blood sugar 177    Plan:    Insulin calculator used to titrate appropriate dose, insulin gtt at 1    unit/hr at 0430    Continue to check BS and titrate insulin q 1 hr.

evidence.display: Pain control (acute pain, chronic pain)    Assessment:    Pt using hand signal l
evidence.text: Pain control (acute pain, chronic pain)    Assessment:    Pt using hand signal like she was pressing her PCA button and shook    head yes that she was in pain.

evidence.display: Pt ,s PCA was d/c d in OR and not appropriate treatment while pt    intubated on
evidence.text: Pt ,s PCA was d/c d in OR and not appropriate treatment while pt    intubated on propofol    Unable to scale pain level    propofol on 50mcg/kg/min for sedation while intubated    Action:    Dilaudid 2 mg IVP q 3 hrs PRN    Response:    Pt nods head yes that pain is tolerable    Plan:    Continue to assess and treat post-op pain    Follow NCP interventions.

evidence.display: Sepsis without organ dysfunction    Assessment:    MRSA operaitve sites, low gra
evidence.text: Sepsis without organ dysfunction    Assessment:    MRSA operaitve sites, low grade temps, WBC 22.2    Action:    Vanco 1000mg IVP q 12 hrs    Response:    Continues with low grade fevers    Plan:    Continue medical treatment as ordered
